scripts.prepare: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.connect: echo "Deprecated command \"npm run connect\". Use \"npm run watch\" instead." && npm run watch

config.name: sync_engine
config.description: Synchronization engine. 'sync-server' uses the signageOS sync server (works across networks). 'p2p-local' uses peer-to-peer on the same LAN, no server required. Defaults to 'sync-server' if unset.

config.name: sync_group
config.description: Name of the sync group. All devices sharing the same group name play in lockstep. Use distinct group names to run independent synchronized sets on the same account. Defaults to 'sync-video-demo' if unset.

config.name: sync_server_uri
config.description: Custom sync-server URI. Only used when sync_engine is 'sync-server'. Leave empty to use the default signageOS sync server.

config.name: debugEnabled
config.description: Show the on-screen debug overlay (status badge + sos API call log). Set to 'false' for production. Defaults to 'true'.
